regions.text: Some noises are loud. These are guns. Guns make loud noises. Those guns make more noise than this gun.
What is this? It is a whistle. It is a steam whistle. It is making a loud noise. This boy has a pocket whistle. He is making some noise with it but not much noise.
This is music. This is a song. These are notes. This is a high note. This is a low note.
This is a very high mountain. These are high mountains. This is a high building. It is a church. This is a low building.
